whatAreCookies.title: What are cookies?
whatAreCookies.description: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They allow websites to recognize your device and store some information about your preferences or actions.

howWeUse.title: How we use cookies
howWeUse.description: We use different types of cookies for various purposes:

managing.title: Managing your cookies
